Interface Condition

All Superinterfaces:
Expression, Segment, Visitable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AndCondition, Between, Comparison, ConstantCondition, FalseCondition, In, IsNull, Like, MultipleCondition, NestedCondition, Not, OrCondition, TrueCondition
public interface Condition extends Segment, Expression
AST Segment for a condition.
Since:
1.1
Author:
Mark Paluch, Jens Schauder
See Also:
  • Conditions

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default Condition
    and(Condition other)
    Combine another Condition using AND.
    default Condition
    not()
    Creates a Condition that negates this Condition.
    default Condition
    or(Condition other)
    Combine another Condition using OR.

    Methods inherited from interface Segment

    equals, hashCode, toString

    Methods inherited from interface Visitable

    visit

  • Method Details

    • and

      default Condition and(Condition other)
      Combine another Condition using AND.
      Parameters:
      other - the other Condition.
      Returns:
      the combined Condition.

    • or

      default Condition or(Condition other)
      Combine another Condition using OR.
      Parameters:
      other - the other Condition.
      Returns:
      the combined Condition.

    • not

      default Condition not()
      Creates a Condition that negates this Condition.
      Returns:
      the negated Condition.
